'''zadungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrotheology|iatrotheology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrotheology|iatrotheology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zadungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædingith|zædingith]] || [[word:zædingij|zædingij]] || [[word:zædingish|zædingish]] || [[word:zædingi|zædingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadudunguth|zadudunguth]] || [[word:zadudunguj|zadudunguj]] || [[word:zadudungush|zadudungush]] || [[word:zadudungu|zadudungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadunguth|zadunguth]] || [[word:zadunguj|zadunguj]] || [[word:zadungush|zadungush]] || [[word:zadungu|zadungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadufnguth|zadufnguth]] || [[word:zadufnguj|zadufnguj]] || [[word:zadufngush|zadufngush]] || [[word:zadufnguf|zadufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadunguthu|zadunguthu]] || [[word:zadunguju|zadunguju]] || [[word:zadungushu|zadungushu]] || [[word:zadunguku|zadunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadunguth|zadunguth]] || [[word:zadunguj|zadunguj]] || [[word:zadungush|zadungush]] || [[word:zadungu|zadungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadunguthul|zadunguthul]] || [[word:zadungujul|zadungujul]] || [[word:zadungushul|zadungushul]] || [[word:zadungukul|zadungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadunguthuthu|zadunguthuthu]] || [[word:zadungujuju|zadungujuju]] || [[word:zadungushushu|zadungushushu]] || [[word:zadunguku|zadunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadunguthun|zadunguthun]] || [[word:zadungujun|zadungujun]] || [[word:zadungushun|zadungushun]] || [[word:zadungukun|zadungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadunguthuoro|zadunguthuoro]] || [[word:zadungujuoro|zadungujuoro]] || [[word:zadungushuoro|zadungushuoro]] || [[word:zadungukuoro|zadungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
